textByRace.goblin: Heavy enough to club something. Fresh enough to smell like sap.
textByRace.elf: Still warm from the tree. You feel guilty.

spawnedTextByRace.goblin: A fresh branch lies on the ground. Still smells like sap.
spawnedTextByRace.human: A branch lies here, freshly cut.
spawnedTextByRace.elf: A branch rests here, severed recently. You can still feel the loss of it.
